25.reason: This loop condition stops one character early, causing the last digit to be omitted. It should be while (j < n) to include all remaining digits.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  The condition should be j < n to print all remaining digits; using n != j+1 stops one digit early, causing truncation.
